name: @citadel-labs/beads-ui
description: Kanban dashboard and git log viewer for Beads

scripts.publish:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
